articles.description: Manchester City have often been accused of being too reliant on Erling Haaland this season. There are signs that could be changing.
articles.title: Leeds 0-1 Man City: Antoine Semenyo takes goalsoring burden off Erling Haaland

articles.description: Manchester United interim boss Michael Carrick comes up against one of the major contenders for the permanent job when Oliver Glasner's Crystal Palace go to Old Trafford on Sunday.
articles.title: Manchester United: Michael Carrick not interested in personal duel with Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner

articles.description: BBC Scotland chief sportswriter Tom English sets the scene going into a compelling Old Firm spectacle on Sunday.
articles.title: Celtic & Rangers face double jeopardy in Old Firm derby like no other

articles.description: Liverpool boosted their Champions League hopes with a 5-2 win against West Ham, helped by three goals from set-pieces in the first half.
articles.title: Liverpool: New set-piece kings can still achieve 'something beautiful' in Premier League

articles.description: Newcastle are languishing in 12th place in the Premier League for a reason - they have conceded 23 goals since they last kept a clean sheet in any competition.
articles.title: Newcastle 2-3 Everton: Deja vu for Eddie Howe after another Premier League defeat

articles.description: Sahibzada Farhan makes a superb century as Pakistan beat Sri Lanka by five runs in the T20 World Cup Super 8s but miss out on a semi-final spot on net run-rate.
articles.title: T20 World Cup 2026 results: Pakistan beat Sri Lanka but eliminated as New Zealand reach semi-finals

articles.description: The England Lions squad are "following official advice" in the UAE after Iran launched attacks throughout the Middle East.
articles.title: England Lions: ECB in contact with UK government as Lions in UAE

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Borussia Dortmund vs Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga
articles.title: Borussia Dortmund vs Bayern Munich: Bundesliga stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Burnley were set to complete one of the greatest Premier League comebacks - until VAR intervened. BBC Sport takes a look at whether the decisions were correct.
articles.title: Burnley 3-4 Brentford: How VAR denied one of the greatest Premier League comebacks

articles.description: England all-rounder Rehan Ahmed plays down his hopes of selection for the T20 World Cup semi-finals despite his crucial role in Friday's win over New Zealand.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: England's Rehan Ahmed plays down hopes of place in semi-final XI
